g.text: Last ≤500 turns · full text · fast traversal · held in memory

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does a node stay active even when it is old?')
sendPrompt('What makes a node highly connected and why does that matter?')
sendPrompt('What is an anchor node in the conversation graph?')
sendPrompt('What is the hot window and how does it relate to the active tier?')

g.text: Turns 500–5,000 · compressed · metadata preserved · medium traversal

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is a compressed node and what gets stripped vs preserved?')
sendPrompt('How is metadata preserved when a node moves to the warm tier?')
sendPrompt('Can a warm node come back to active if it gets referenced?')

g.text: 5,000+ turns · archived · on-demand retrieval only · never deleted

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the cold tier retrieve a node when it is needed?')
sendPrompt('What triggers retrieval of a cold node during graph traversal?')
sendPrompt('Is there a limit to how many turns the cold tier can hold?')
